_comment: Verified-working firms only. Each entry uses a public, unauthenticated job-board API. After live-testing, these are the firms whose public boards actually return data. Elite PE firms (KKR, Apollo, Carlyle, Warburg, TPG, Brookfield, etc.) host on private or protected Workday tenants and cannot be queried anonymously. We compensate by (a) adding broad search sources and (b) keeping all 181 curated jobs pinned in data/manual/jobs.json.

firms._comment: Phase 2 — custom adapters for private-portal firms

not_publicly_queryable: KKR, Carlyle, TPG, Brookfield Asset Management, CVC, Advent, Thoma Bravo, Vista, Ares, Oaktree, Blue Owl, GIP, I Squared, Stonepeak, Macquarie — Workday tenants require session cookies or are whitelabel-protected
IFC, World Bank, IDB, EBRD, DFC, FMO, Proparco, DEG, Norfund, AfDB, ADB — multilateral career sites use custom portals (SuccessFactors, Taleo, or bespoke) not queryable anonymously
Temasek, GIC, Mubadala, ADIA, QIA — SWFs use private portals
CPP, CDPQ, OTPP, PSP — Canadian pensions use protected Workday tenants
HarbourVest, Hamilton Lane, Partners Group — not accessible via public APIs
_notes.workaround: All missing firms' current jobs are already seeded into data/manual/jobs.json (181 jobs, all pinned). They remain on the live site permanently. Phase 2 will add per-firm HTML parsers for the most important inaccessible firms (IFC, World Bank, IDB, EBRD, DFC, Temasek, GIC).
